'''bomadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberous|rubberous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberous|rubberous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bomadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bomadithi|bomadithi]] || [[word:bomadiji|bomadiji]] || [[word:bomadishi|bomadishi]] || [[word:bomadiki|bomadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bomaduthuthu|bomaduthuthu]] || [[word:bomadujuju|bomadujuju]] || [[word:bomadushushu|bomadushushu]] || [[word:bomadukuku|bomadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bomaduthu|bomaduthu]] || [[word:bomaduju|bomaduju]] || [[word:bomadushu|bomadushu]] || [[word:bomaduku|bomaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bomadufthuf|bomadufthuf]] || [[word:bomadufjuf|bomadufjuf]] || [[word:bomadufshuf|bomadufshuf]] || [[word:bomadufkuf|bomadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bomadethe|bomadethe]] || [[word:bomadeje|bomadeje]] || [[word:bomadeshe|bomadeshe]] || [[word:bomadeke|bomadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bomadothotho|bomadothotho]] || [[word:bomadojojo|bomadojojo]] || [[word:bomadoshosho|bomadoshosho]] || [[word:bomadokoko|bomadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bomadotho|bomadotho]] || [[word:bomadojo|bomadojo]] || [[word:bomadosho|bomadosho]] || [[word:bomadoko|bomadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bomadofthof|bomadofthof]] || [[word:bomadofjof|bomadofjof]] || [[word:bomadofshof|bomadofshof]] || [[word:bomadofkof|bomadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfthÃŸf|bomadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfjÃŸf|bomadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfshÃŸf|bomadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfkÃŸf|bomadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bomadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bomadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bomadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bomadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfthÃŸf|bomadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfjÃŸf|bomadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfshÃŸf|bomadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfkÃŸf|bomadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfthÃŸf|bomadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfjÃŸf|bomadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfshÃŸf|bomadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bomadÃŸfkÃŸf|bomadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bomadÃḊthÃḊ|bomadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bomadÃḊjÃḊ|bomadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bomadÃḊshÃḊ|bomadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bomadÃḊkÃḊ|bomadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bomadathatha|bomadathatha]] || [[word:bomadajaja|bomadajaja]] || [[word:bomadashasha|bomadashasha]] || [[word:bomadakaka|bomadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bomadatha|bomadatha]] || [[word:bomadaja|bomadaja]] || [[word:bomadasha|bomadasha]] || [[word:bomadaka|bomadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bomadafthaf|bomadafthaf]] || [[word:bomadafjaf|bomadafjaf]] || [[word:bomadafshaf|bomadafshaf]] || [[word:bomadafkaf|bomadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bomadasha|bomadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bomadshÃḋsha|bomadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bomadrosha|bomadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bomadmusha|bomadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bomadyasha|bomadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobomadnkshÃḋsha|gobomadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobomadnkrosha|gobomadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobomadnkmusha|gobomadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobomadnkyasha|gobomadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bomamadasha|bomamadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bomamadshÃḋsha|bomamadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bomamadrosha|bomamadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bomamadmusha|bomamadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bomamadyasha|bomamadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobomamadnkshÃḋsha|gobomamadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobomamadnkrosha|gobomamadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobomamadnkmusha|gobomamadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobomamadnkyasha|gobomamadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bemÃḊdasha|bemÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bemÃḊdshÃḋsha|bemÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bemÃḊdrosha|bemÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bemÃḊdmusha|bemÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bemÃḊdyasha|bemÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobemÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gobemÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobemÃḊdnkrosha|gobemÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobemÃḊdnkmusha|gobemÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobemÃḊdnkyasha|gobemÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bomfadasha|bomfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bomfadshÃḋsha|bomfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bomfadrosha|bomfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bomfadmusha|bomfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bomfadyasha|bomfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobomfadnkshÃḋsha|gobomfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobomfadnkrosha|gobomfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobomfadnkmusha|gobomfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobomfadnkyasha|gobomfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
